review_title: The App Everyone Should Choose
description: We are very satisfied with the product, as it truly allows me to showcase my field of service in the best possible way. We are also happy with the support we received while learning how to use the platform and setting up our website. Overall, it was a very positive experience. We got quick and easy solutions to the issues we encountered, and for us, this app is the best on the market for the price. It offers a wide range of possibilities for all types of businesses.
author: Sarah A.
pros: It is an exceptionally user-friendly application that allows me to modify and personalize my website according to my specific requirements.
cons: The configured fonts cannot be previewed before selecting them, so when editing text, we had to remember which font corresponds to each style.

review_title: A Reliable and Easy-to-Use Platform for Growing eCommerce and Marketplaces
author: Dejan G.
pros: What we like most about Shopamine is how responsive and easy to work with it is. The platform is simple to use and quick to understand, even for users without technical knowledge. The PIM stands out because it is very intuitive and well organized, making product management clear and efficient. Overall, Shopamine helps teams work faster and manage their webshop or marketplace without unnecessary complexity.
cons: From our point of view, nothing major is missing from the platform. Shopamine covers the key features needed to run and manage an eCommerce or marketplace efficiently, and it continues to evolve in the right direction.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Review of an ecommerce platform Shopamine
description: We like the professional communication, quality of support, the pricing is competitive and we were pleased with the integration with our ERP system.
author: Anja C.
pros: Responsivnes of support team is very good
cons: There are not enough functionalities, other is ok.

review_title: A Platform That Grows With You
description: There is a learning curve at the beginning, and it can feel a bit overwhelming at first. But once you start understanding how things work, you quickly see how much is actually possible. Each update opens new functionality and expands what you can build, which makes the platform feel like it is constantly evolving. In the long run, this creates a very strong customer experience. You can see continuous improvements across all areas, from uptime and stability to feature development in the storefront, CMS, and PIM. The long-term direction feels solid, well structured, and very promising.
author: Alen Š.
pros: The platform delivers strong value for money, especially considering the level of control it gives you once you go beyond the basics. The support is reliable, fast, and genuinely helpful, which makes working with it feel safe and professional. After a short onboarding period, it becomes very intuitive and easy to understand. Even complex features are presented in a clear and structured way. At first, the visual builder may seem limited because it is based on predefined building blocks, but this quickly becomes irrelevant. With full access to HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, you can build completely custom solutions and go far beyond standard layouts. In many areas, it actually offers more control than expected, especially where most platforms usually feel restrictive. It feels like an iceberg. On the surface, it looks simple and compact. Once you start digging deeper, you realize how powerful and flexible the platform really is, with far more features and possibilities than initially visible.
cons: At the beginning, there were a few uptime issues, but they were resolved quickly and professionally. Since then, stability has improved a lot and is now close to enterprise standards. A few small social features are also missing, such as comments on items. They are not essential for core functionality, but they would be a nice addition for more community-oriented use cases.

review_title: Our Global Digital platform on Shopamine
description: It was a customer delight for us right from the beginning. Creation of template according to our style guidelines was done very quickly, which gave us all the lego blocks to build complex pages without any coding, which could be achieved by juniors or even designers or operations team members. We are an international organisation with operations in more than 180 countries. To rollout across the globe, simultaneously training our global team in self service capabilities was a breeze. This reduced the workload of our support staff, letting them to focus on more important aspects of our digital platform.
author: Nanda Kishore K.
pros: 1. Personalisation - Content can be personalised for end user, based on browsing history or preferences or any other pre defined parameters. 2. Landing page builder - Self service landing page builder is very useful. No coding is needed. We needed to put up a page in Spain and Germany for Yoga event and it took just 2 hours to get it up and running, while earlier it took longer and consumed developer’s time. 3. API friendly - The ease with which we can call Shopamine APIs and Shopamine can call other third party APIs is a productivity enhancement feature that is useful in incorporating complex logic into Ecommerce pages. 4. PIM - Product Information Model is very useful to quickly build a product catalog for our organisation. This feature can be extended for any listing that is of importance for our organisation. 5. Copying shopfront for other locales is a feature that helped us to replicate a shopfront for multiple geographies with minimal effort. 6. No plugins are needed. It is one stop shop as everything comes out of the box. 7. It is enterprise ready and has integrations with other ERPs, which enables Shopamine to a lean and mean front end for a heavy ERP back end.
cons: 1. An import/export of pages across different shopfronts would be very useful. 2. A stronger access control mechanism to enable Publish workflow is needed. Happy to note from the Shopamine dev team that both the above features are coming up in future releases.

review_title: Platform optimized for B2B companies
description: Website developers are available to provide direct support upon request. Our experience with them was excellent when we sought custom features and upgrades beyond the standard offerings. The team was highly responsive and attentive, ensuring our needs were fully understood and addressed. We integrated the store with the ERP system as well, and this reduced our workload and optimised sales process.
author: Tanja K.
pros: I liked the ease of use for every day people. The pricing of the product is great as the features that are available in the plan give you really good return on investment. We used the CSV import tool a lot as it is a great option to import a lot of product information in a store.
cons: The feature for building advanced product customization (product variants, options) is really good but in more complex products some customization is necessary that is harder to complete.

review_title: Robust, Versatile, and Packed with Powerful Features
description: Incredible value for money. Such a robust and versatile platform and great support.
author: Nik Z.
pros: I really appreciate the custom CSS editor which allows me to make that extra touch to my storefront. Also there is a lot of options through API. The most fascinating is the CMS content editor with the Rules editor, that allows you to show specific content in specific situations.
cons: Although there is a lot options to set up the final price using margins, discount or fixed price etc. - I would really appreciate the per supplier price import for connected external suppliers.

review_title: Fast, user-friendly, and seamless integration with great support
description: Our experience with Shopamine has been exceptionally smooth.
author: Niko M.
pros: Our store front is really fast on Shopamine. We like the support. It is easy to use. Also the dashboard is really fast. The integration with our ERP is running seamlessly.
cons: Just a few minor issues here and there, but they were mostly resolved quickly.

review_title: Shopamine for B2B distribution
description: We are very happy with Shopamine and would recommend it to small and large businesses.
author: Jure F.
pros: Great SEO optimization features. Elastic search is good and responsive. Good optimization for mobile devices. Great that you don't need any extra plugins. The CMS and ecommerce works out of the box. Good personalization features.
cons: User rules can be a bit overwhelming when you're first starting out.
author_profession: Marketing manager, web designer and administrator

review_title: User friendly and upgradable software for web shops
description: Overall Shopamine is excellent website software, you can use it for small or very complex and advanced webshops without any problems. It allows you a lot of adjustments and upgrades.
author: Matej K.
pros: Design, modularity, flexibility of structure and user friendly interface and administration page
cons: Integration with ERP needs some improvement

review_title: A Reliable Platform With Strong Support
description: Overall, the experience has been very positive. Whenever issues appear, the support team reacts quickly and works on them in a transparent and professional way. That creates a strong sense of trust in the platform. The uptime is reliable and stable, which is critical for daily operations. As a company, we are genuinely satisfied with both the platform and the level of service. It feels like a long-term partnership rather than just using a software product.
author: Rok B.
pros: What I like most is the backend, especially the product management and PIM. It gives you a lot of freedom in how you edit products and how you filter and work with larger catalogs. Once you start using it, you really feel how powerful this part of the platform is. Managing categories and the overall structure is very straightforward and makes sense logically. It does not feel complicated or overengineered. Everything is where you expect it to be. The speed is another big plus. Both the admin area and the storefront are extremely fast, and the performance feels solid and reliable, on the level you would normally expect from much larger enterprise systems.
cons: The CMS could be improved in some areas. There are no prebuilt elements or content blocks, so creating subpages takes more time than it should. It is fully capable and flexible, but it is not as intuitive to use as other parts of the platform. Adding more ready-made components would make content creation faster and more efficient.

review_title: An e-commerce platform suitable for big catalogue of products with multiple suppliers.
description: We were looking for a platform that could handle a big catalogue of products with multiple suppliers, and Shopamine did that perfectly for us. We really liked the swift and personal support of the staff, who are based within the EU.
author: Luka D.
pros: We operate a large catalogue of products with multiple possible suppliers per product. What really attracted us to the platform was the built-in ability to set multiple suppliers per product and the built-in logic for choosing the right supplier when the purchase is made or the product is shown. What helped us a lot as well is the ability to set product specifications template for each category containing similar products. This way we can easily format different specifications into a unified format. There's even an AI function that does the job for you, which saves us a lot of time and effort. Also, the built-in designer, when compared to another platform, is easiest for our non-technical team to use.
cons: We had a couple issues with API uploading, but that was resolved swiftly by their team. It was regarding our specific use case, so I suppose that was the reason behind it.

review_title: Satisfied b2b and b2c user
description: Overall we are very satisfied customers of the app for over 10 years.
author: Tea L.
pros: The app is user-friendly and intuitive, offers excellent filters for working. The app allows us set up personalized pricing for B2B and B2C.
cons: The least appealing aspects for me are credit card payment processing and not possible to edit customer email.

review_title: Using more than 10 years - very satisfied
description: Overall we are really satisfied. All our suggestions are accepted by support of Shopamine.
author: Saska B.
pros: It's simply to use, edit and create new products, manage orders, view product inventory. One of the feature is possibility of using b2b and b2c portal in one. The user can set a custom design based on their own wishes and needs. The app is improving all the time.
cons: Entering the discount code is the last step in the order process.

review_title: Using it since 2010
description: I am happy we have chosen Shopamine in 2010.
author: Elvis P.
pros: Simplicity. I love we can manage the sales in one spot. It has a great reach with outstanding SEO.
cons: No support for Bitcoin Lightning payments

review_title: An honest review of Shopamine: they are the best
description: It's been brilliant so far - we've received timely support and troubleshooting even in the middle of the night. They are a dedicated team who know exactly what they are delivering/offering.
author: Chetan S.
pros: Shopamine is great - we are able to use so many features right out of the box - like plug and play. Even non technical people are able to work on it with ease. In Shopamine, we've found a great tool which can customize to our specific requirement to show personalized content to our various user personas. And configuring and managing this content in the back end is very intuitive for our users. We are able to build landing pages extremely quickly, (with customizations), which has helped us showcase more of our products to our customers.
cons: To accommodate articles, a little more development will need to be done.

review_title: All-in-one E-Commerce platform
description: Shopamine is an outstanding E-commerce platform and the best tool for website creation without any technical knowledge or coding experience, neither there is a need for any plugins. It results in smooth and fast performance.
author: THIRu M.
pros: Shopamine makes it easy to create a Dynamic website and easy to build a multilanguage website without any plugins. It is mobile responsive and Shopamine also provides templates that can be easily used. It is one of the best E-commerce platform providers which has dashboards for sales analysis, customer behavior, performance of the product, easy-to-track orders & shipping information. Shopamine makes it easy for someone without much technical expertise to set up and manage an online store. It is an SEO-friendly Tool where meta, Schema, OG tags, analytics GTM scripts can be added easily, and is also a secured system.
cons: Shopamine is good, but it would be better if the feature of drag and drop of components/boxes is offered.

review_title: developer's angle of working with shopamine
description: It has been very easy to come on board and work on this platform.
author: Amogh K.
pros: Having worked on the code base of Shopamine, I liked how robust their product is. Their usage of latest technologies, well built architecture and easy to understand documentations makes working on Shopmaine a joy.
cons: Shopamine can give a little more flexibility with respect to alterations of some specification detials through APIs.

review_title: I highly recommend Shopamine
description: I like Shopamine product and Shopamine team. Product is awesome. Simple to use without compromising the quality of the output. They are very supportive. They understand our problem statement from our stand point and give proper solution. And with a quick turn around time.
author: Sasipriya K.
pros: I use Shopamine mainly for website creation. I find shopamine very user-friendly tool to build a website. Shopamine has a number of ready to use components which can be used with ease even by a non-technical person. Landing pages can be created within no time and content management is so easy and immediate. The content can also be personalized as per our business needs. It also cater to multiple languages which again can be done in some simple steps. Meta details and analytical scripts can be given effortlessly. It is also an incredible ecommerce platform.
cons: Nested conditional boxes can have different colour highlight, for now the conditional boxes are all the same colour.

review_title: Simple and Smooth E-Commerce Platform
description: Using Shopamine has been a really good experience. It’s easy to figure out, and it has all the things you need to set up and run an online store. Everything is simple and works well.
author: Arunraj M.
pros: I like how easy Shopamine is to use. The layout is simple and straightforward, which makes setting up and running an online store a breeze, even if you’re not tech-savvy.
cons: Shopamine is a great platform, but there are a few things that could be better. The design options, while good, might not be flexible enough for those who want more creative control.

review_title: First time webshop owner
description: Overall my experience has been very positive. I love working with the team who is available and very structured in their approach. I think they are very flexible based on your needs and business development stage. If you are a newbie like me or a more experienced user, they can adapt their approach to what you need and that is a big plus for any business.
author: Annjulie B.
pros: I like the fact that the team is always available to help. I feel like I am working with people and not with an automated online system. The platform is very flexible and allows for great level of customisation of the webshop. As an online retailer I was looking for a platform that I can grow my business with and Shopamine is just that.
cons: At first, the back end system to build the website isn't very intuitive but overtime and as you go through it step by step, it becomes easier and more user friendly. My advice is, do spend time going through all aspects of it with the account manager and go through the training material.

review_title: Integration Partners
description: Our experience with Shopamine has been outstanding over the years. We've been working closely with their team for many years, and the collaboration has been consistently positive. Their openness to building new integrations and improving their platform to meet customer needs is impressive.
author: Miha M.
pros: I like Shopamine's exceptional customer support and seamless integrations with various third-party tools, which help run websites. The platform also offers an extensive list of functionalities specially tailored for running a B2B store, which makes managing complex workflows, managing multiple warehouses, contract prices, etc.
cons: While the platform offers a wide range of functionalities, having more robust API capabilities would enhance flexibility for businesses that want to implement a headless setup.

review_title: Best eCommerce platform with no additional plugins needed
description: The overall experience is great. To have PIM and CMS integrated together in one platform really makes contend and information easy to manage. With all additional features this is a powerful platform especially for b2b users
author: Jakob R.
pros: I love the platform as it has all the features included so there is no need for external plugins. One of the best things is that you can show user personalized content with ease. This gives you an option to display dynamic content to different users based on roles and conditions.
cons: Since the start of using the platform i did not find any bad things about the platform that i could mention here.

review_title: Positive review of Shopamine platform
description: As mentioned above the platform is really convenient to use and offers lots of different features and options to stay flexible in designing your own website.
author: Lara G.
pros: We like the platform's ease of use, fast responses from the support team, and great communication.
cons: Currently, i don't have any specific points to add that would be a downside to this product.

review_title: Shopamine platform review
author: Anita M.
pros: We like the ease of use of the platform ant all of the different features they provide as they fully cover our needs. We really like the support as it is very responsive.
cons: We would like the support to bo accessible from 6AM
author_profession: Head of Marketing for Retail Trade
